'''Arat Fraca''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Arat Fraca system/Legends|Arat Fraca system]] of the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]]. The ''[[Star Morning]]'' suddenly reappeared over Arat Fraca a year after leaving [[Motexx]] for [[Gowdawl]]. Arat Fraca was two sectors away from Motexx. From Arat Fraca, the ''Star Morning'' proceeded to [[Darepp]], where it landed.

{{Planet-stub}}
